hypothesis: Incorporating a token-class–weighted KL anchor into DPO that penalizes divergence on element-symbol and numeral tokens at least 5× more than on other tokens will prevent the collapse observed in OLMo-2 and yield a ≥15% increase in mean Thermo-Calc reward over OLMo-2 SFT while preserving coverage recall ≥0.98 and Unique pairs @100 ≥0.98.
